message.content: {"explanation": "The defendant committed a serious breach of fiduciary duty by embezzling $25,000. However, mitigating factors include the lack of a prior criminal record and the fact that partial restitution has already been made. A brief period of incarceration is appropriate to serve as a deterrent and reflect the seriousness of the offense, while allowing the defendant to return to society relatively quickly to complete full restitution.","verdict": 6}

decoded.explanation: The defendant committed a serious breach of fiduciary duty by embezzling $25,000. However, mitigating factors include the lack of a prior criminal record and the fact that partial restitution has already been made. A brief period of incarceration is appropriate to serve as a deterrent and reflect the seriousness of the offense, while allowing the defendant to return to society relatively quickly to complete full restitution.
